name: opencode-context-governor
description: OpenCode plugin that injects context-window budget awareness and handoff instructions without forking OpenCode.

scripts.check: node --check src/plugin.js && bash -n scripts/install.sh && bash -n scripts/subagent-smoke.sh && bash -n scripts/auto-continue-prepare-smoke.sh && bash -n scripts/auto-continue-prompt-async-smoke.sh && bash -n scripts/auto-continue-subagent-smoke.sh
scripts.smoke: cd test-fixture && ${OPENCODE_BIN:-$HOME/.opencode/bin/opencode} run 'Say hello in one sentence. If you see CONTEXT BUDGET HANDOFF REQUIRED, follow it exactly.'
